Genes are pieces of genetic information in [[organisms]]

They are found in the [[MGS model]]
==See Also==
* [[Scenes]]
* [[Memes]]

== References ==
[[Category:MGS model]]
[[sn:Genes]][[Category:Sapient Psychology]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[sn:Genes]][[sn:Genes]][[Category:Genetics]]
[[sn:Genes]][[Category:MGS roots]]
[[sn:Genes]]
[[Category:Pages]]
